title: Why Do 90% of Retail Traders Lose? (Take the Quiz)
description: Think you know why most traders fail? Test yourself with this quick quiz — the answer might surprise you. R2F Trading has been coaching ICT traders for 10+ years. If you're struggling with funded accounts, smart money concepts, or order blocks, this one's for you. Weekend warriors: use this downtime to sharpen your edge. Visit r2ftrading.com for the full system. #ICTTrading #SmartMoneyConcepts #FundedTrader
script: I blew 3 funded accounts before learning this. Don't make my mistake. Quick quiz — why do 90% of retail traders lose money? Think you know the answer? Is it A — bad risk management? B — no trading strategy? Or C — they trade against smart money? Pick your answer. Most people get this wrong. The answer is C. Retail traders lose because they trade against smart money — every single time. They chase breakouts. Smart money hunts those stops. That's the trap. That's where the 90% live. The R2F Trading system teaches you to read order blocks, fair value gaps, and liquidity — so you trade WITH smart money, not against it. Follow R2F Trading. New edge drops every week. r2ftrading.com.
